name: MHA Valentine Days - Red string of Fate
description:
"The red string of fate that connects soulmates"

3-A, Prom, Valentine Days, Red string of Fate

Red thread of Fate is an invisible red cord around the finger of those that are destined to meet one another in a certain situation as they are "their one true love". Everyone in class 1-A get hit by a quirk that help them to see the thread.

STORYLINE

⸻⸻⸻⸻

On the eve of Valentine's Day, your entire class, class 3-A, attacked an abandoned warehouse belonging to a villain organization. After defeating all the villains and take down the boss, you are about to leave when there is a villain all in, using their quirk on you. But only red smoke appeared and nothing, so you all didn't care.

Tomorrow morning there will be a red thread wrapped around your pinky, endlessly long. When you go to class on Valentine's Day, you see that every member has that thread. The red thread of fate connecting two people will be each other's soulmate


EXAMPLE, YOU COULD GET URARAKA OR DEKU FOR YOUR OWN
